name: BoundaryEQ
description: The zero-playback smart EQ that instantly scans your audio to lock in your frequency boundaries without the guesswork.

fullDetails.about: The zero-playback smart EQ that instantly scans your audio to lock in your frequency boundaries without the guesswork.
fullDetails.coreValue: In a traditional workflow, setting high-pass and low-pass filters is a manual, repetitive guessing game. BoundaryEQ changes the rules by using ARA 2.0 technology to scan your entire audio file the moment you insert the plugin. It identifies the root pitch and the highest useful harmonics instantly, snapping your filters to the optimal boundaries to ensure a clean, focused starting point before you even hit play.

features.title: ARA 2.0 & Drag-and-Drop Integration
features.desc: Utilize the full power of ARA 2.0 for a total file scan in seconds. For non-ARA hosts, simply drag and drop your audio file directly into the UI for the same instant offline analysis.

features.title: Intelligent Auto-Filtering
features.desc: The engine automatically calculates the "Floor" and "Ceiling" of your signal. It snaps a High-Pass filter to the lowest detected fundamental and a Low-Pass filter to the edge of the musical frequency range, instantly removing sub-rumble and top-end hiss.

features.title: Four Specialized Detection Modes
features.desc: Tailor the analysis to your source material with four distinct algorithms: Standard, Loose, Tight, and Vocal. Each mode adjusts how the auto-filters prioritize the frequency profile to ensure the perfect focus for any track.

features.title: Full-File Visualization
features.desc: Stop guessing where your filters should sit. The UI displays a static, full-file frequency profile that clearly highlights the root fundamental and the highest harmonics of your audio. Use this to instantly verify the auto-detection or to manually snap your boundaries with absolute confidence.

features.title: Smart State Memory
features.desc: BoundaryEQ stays out of your way by remembering your last selected detection mode. Whether you prefer the Vocal or Tight algorithm, the plugin defaults to your favorite setting every time you load it, keeping your workflow consistent across every track.

features.title: 4-Band Professional EQ Suite
features.desc: Beyond the auto-boundaries, you have full control with four additional high-quality parametric bands. Toggle between Bell, Low-Shelf, and High-Shelf types with precise Q control and transparent processing for final tone shaping.

specs.formatDesc: Compatible with ARA-enabled DAWs including Reaper, Cubase, and Fender Studio Pro. Windows only for now.
specs.fileSupportDesc: Full file scan for instant analysis.

fullDetails.workflowTitle: Clean up your tracks in 3 steps.
fullDetails.footerSubtext: Zero Real-Time Waiting • Intelligent Filtering • Pure Precision

steps.title: Scan Your Signal
steps.desc: Insert BoundaryEQ on an ARA-enabled track or drag your audio file into the UI. The plugin immediately "reads" the frequency profile of the entire clip without requiring real-time playback.

steps.title: Snap the Boundaries
steps.desc: Choose your Detection Mode. BoundaryEQ instantly sets your HPF and LPF to the optimal frequency range for that specific file, giving you a clean, usable signal in one click.

steps.title: Refine the Tone
steps.desc: Use the 4-band parametric suite (Bell/Shelf) to make your final adjustments. Because your boundaries are already set, you’re starting with a signal that is already focused and ready for the mix.

name: NoisyPlayer
description: Turns reference tracks into shaped white noise for instant, surgical EQ matching without the wait.

fullDetails.tagline: Surgical EQ Matching. Zero Wait Time.
fullDetails.about: NoisyPlayer is a utility VSTi designed to eliminate the tedious "loop and wait" process of traditional EQ matching. By turning any reference track into a constant, steady stream of shaped white noise, you can capture perfect EQ profiles in seconds.
fullDetails.coreValue: In a standard workflow, EQ matching requires you to play back a dynamic reference track while your analyzer "learns" the curve. NoisyPlayer replaces that dynamic signal with a static, perfectly sculpted carrier of white noise that matches the exact average frequency footprint of your reference.

features.title: Multi-Format File Input
features.desc: Effortlessly drag and drop WAV, AIFF, or MP3 files into the UI to calculate a full-file average magnitude spectrum immediately.

features.title: Shaped Noise Engine
features.desc: A high-quality white noise generator acts as a neutral carrier, sculpted by the analyzed reference footprint.

features.title: Steady Signal Source
features.desc: Provides a predictable, constant output that allows EQ matching plugins to capture a profile instantly without waiting for peaks or quiet sections.

features.title: Real-Time Visualization
features.desc: A built-in frequency analyzer shows you the exact curve of the shaped noise being generated.

features.title: Flexible Triggering
features.desc: Start the signal via a dedicated Internal Play Toggle or trigger it via MIDI for precise control within your DAW.

features.title: Output Management
features.desc: Integrated gain control allows you to manually adjust the volume of the resulting noise, ensuring it sits at the perfect level for your ears and your processing chain.

specs.formatDesc: Compatible with Windows DAWs including Ableton, FL Studio, and Reaper.
specs.fileSupportDesc: Supports high-fidelity lossless formats for accurate frequency analysis.

fullDetails.footerSubtext: Zero Latency • Instant Analysis • Free Forever

steps.title: Drop Your Reference
steps.desc: Drag any audio file (WAV, AIFF, or MP3) directly into the NoisyPlayer drop zone. The engine instantly analyzes the entire file to find its unique frequency "fingerprint."

steps.title: Generate the Noise
steps.desc: Toggle the Play button. The plugin instantly generates white noise that is filtered to match the exact spectral curve of your reference file.

steps.title: Instant Match
steps.desc: Open your favorite EQ matching plugin on the same track. Because the noise is steady and constant, the EQ will capture the match profile immediately—no more looping the chorus and waiting for the analyzer to settle.
